404.headline: Page Not Found
404.description: Sorry, we couldn't find the page you're looking for. It might have been moved or removed.

500.headline: Internal Server Error
500.description: Something went wrong on our end. Our engineering team has been notified. Please try again later.

403.headline: Access Denied
403.description: You do not have permission to view this page or resource.

401.headline: Unauthorized
401.description: Please sign in to access this page.

generic.headline: An Error Occurred
generic.description: We encountered an unexpected error processing your request.
